---
format:
  modern2-cover-letter-pdf: default
author: David Schoch
date: today
date-format: long

cvfont: raleway #texlive fonts like raleway,fetamont,gillius,comfortaa
cvcolor: 
  main: B83B5E
  accent: 6A2C70
  
title: Motivation letter
sub-title: 'Application as Team Lead "Transparent Social Analytics"'

contact:
  street: First Street 1
  zip: 1234
  city: Some City
  phone: +1 2345 6789
  mail: some.mail@mailbox.com
  
organization: 
  contact-person: Big Boss
  name: Important Corporation
  street: Second Street 2
  zip: 1234 
  city: Some City
    
---

Dear  boss,

This is my first paragraph.
I'm super interested in the job.

Kind regards,

David
